title: Decimillipede Back
move_pattern: Cycles between Writhe, Constrict, and Bulk attacks in a fixed order. The starting move varies based on segment position (determined by StarterMoveIdx). After dying, transitions through Dead state to Reattach for healing before resuming normal attacks.
notes: This is a back segment variant of the Decimillipede boss. Multiple segments fight together in the same encounter, each with unique HP adjusted upon entering combat (incremented by 2 if matching teammate HP). The Reattach Power enables the segment to heal via the Reattach move, allowing for survival and recovery during extended battles.
